title: 1 bunch (12 single stems stems)artificial lavender bush
features: Stunning Lavender Bundle: This artificial lavender bush features 12 purple stems, perfect for adding a touch of natural beauty to any indoor space.
Versatile Decorative Use: Ideal for faux flower craft projects, flower displays in lobby areas, hallways, living rooms, and entertaining spaces.
High-Quality Artificial Flowers: Made by Blue Frog Toys, these lavender stems are designed to last, providing long-lasting enjoyment and style.
Perfect Size for Indoor Decor: Measuring 24cm, this artificial lavender plant fits perfectly in hallway, living room, or home decor settings.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Interior home decor, office or workplace settings
